===Pokémon Adventures===
===={{MangaArc|Black 2 & White 2}}====
[[File:Roxie Marlon Adventures.png|thumb|270px|Roxie in Pokémon Adventures]]
Roxie was first mentioned by {{adv|Yuko}} in ''[[PS530|Movie Panic]]'', where she debuted in ''[[PS533|New Sword Player]]''. After attending one of her concerts, {{adv|Blake}} asked Roxie to be a judge at the [[Aspertia City]] [[Pokémon academy|Trainers' School]] [[Autumn Choir Tournament]], which she happily accepted. In ''[[PS534|Choir Tournament]]'', after Blake's team won the competition, Roxie had [[Pop Roxie|her father]] take the winning team and their class to [[Castelia City]] to compete in the Unova Choir Tournament.

In ''[[PS535|Angry Boy]]'', shortly after arriving at their destination, Roxie encountered an injured member of the executive committee for the Unova Choir Tournament. When the man revealed his {{p|Karrablast}} was stolen by [[Team Plasma]], Roxie, Blake, {{adv|Whitley}}, and [[Hugh]] headed to the [[Castelia Sewers]] to find the culprits. Soon after entering the area, everyone was attacked by a group of {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s. Roxie and Whitley were separated from the others, but they managed to defeat the Grunts, forcing them to retreat.

In ''[[PS538|Therian Forme III]]'', Roxie and Whitley left the sewers to meet with the others at Prime Pier. Whitley stayed behind while Roxie went ahead to return the executive committee member's Karrablast. Hugh appeared and revealed to everyone that a student was a member of Team Plasma, forcing Whitley to come out of hiding and reveal herself. Finding her behavior suspicious, Roxie and the class began to suspect Whitley, but were put to sleep by her [[Foongy]]'s spores.

In ''[[PS541|Pink Slip]]'', {{adv|Cheren}} woke up to find he, Roxie, and the class were taken to the [[Marine Tube]]. There, they encountered [[Benga]], a Trainers' School student that was suspended on the first day of school for picking a fight with his classmates. Benga and [[Marlon]] took everyone to safety after Castelia was frozen over by Team Plasma's flying ship, the [[Plasma Frigate]]. When asked to join Benga and Marlon launch a counterattack against the villains, Roxie and Cheren agreed.

In ''[[PS548|Epilogue]]'', Roxie attended the Trainers' School graduation ceremony.
